use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation bars and headers
Showing user avatars in comment sections, chat interfaces, or user lists
Providing fallback initials when user images fail to load
Representing users in card components or dashboard interfaces
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based Avatar component with image and fallback support for displaying user profile pictures. Features rounded-full styling with responsive sizing and is designed for universal use across applications requiring user identification or profile representation.
